sqlMap.select: SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = d.CN ORDER BY LPAD(IFNULL(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME, CLOSED_DAY, ATTITUDE_MOD_APPL, CLOSED_DATE_ATTITUDE, date_format(CONF_SET_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CONF_SET_DATE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime#, CLOSED_DAY = #closedDay#, ATTITUDE_MOD_APPL = #attitudeModAppl#, CLOSED_DATE_ATTITUDE = #closedDateAttitude#, CONF_SET_DATE = str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.cn AS userid, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, TBL_USERMASTER.title AS usertitle, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname AS userName, TBL_USERMASTER.description AS deptName, IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE)
TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') = #searchGubun#
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname
ORDER BY TBL_USERMASTER.displayname
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') = #searchGubun#

SELECT TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IFNULL(IMG_PATH,'') AS IMG_PATH, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS PARENT_ID, FORM_ID, ISADD FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
ISUSE = #isuse#
PARENT_ID = 'A05'
TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03', 'A05')
AND ISDEL = '0'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISUSE = #isuse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IFNULL(IMG_PATH,'') AS IMG_PATH, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS PARENT_ID, FORM_ID, ISADD FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
SELECT MAX(cast(substring(TYPE_ID,2) as unsigned)) + 1 AS MAXTYPEID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FORM_ID, TENANT_ID, FORM_NAME, FORM_NAME2, FORM_HTML FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET TYPE_NAME = #typeName#, TYPE_NAME2 = #typeName2# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE (TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, PARENT_ID, ISADD, ISDEL, FORM_ID) VALUES (#typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, 'A05', '1', '0', (SELECT A.FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TYPE_ID = 'A11'))

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #selectedUserId#

SELECT SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5) AS workstarttime, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5) AS workendtime, '0' AS gubun FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISPLAYNAME AS USER_NAME, CN AS USER_ID, TITLE AS JIKWI, MAIL AS MAIL, DESCRIPTION AS DEPT_NAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND $key$ LIKE concat('%',#value#,'%')
AND $key$ = #value#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF (user_id, tenant_id, work_starttime, work_endtime, company_id, dept_id) SELECT #selectedUserId# AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #selectedUserId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE work_starttime = #workStartTime#, work_endtime = #workEndTime#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT D.CN AS ID, IF(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1=NULL
OR D.CN=#companyId#
,'##',D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) AS PARENT, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, D.DISPLAYNAME AS TEXT, CASE D.CN WHEN D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 THEN 'COMP' ELSE 'DEPT' END AS ISCOMP, CASE D.CN WHEN U.DEPARTMENT THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS MYDEPT FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.extensionattribute2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), D.DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectedUserIdList[]#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) AS startdate, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12) AS starttime, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(A.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute),'') AS enddate, IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12),'') AS endtime, A.modappl, A.ip, A.date_type AS datetype, A.type_id AS typeid, B.type_name AS typename, C.displayname AS username, C.description AS deptname, C.title AS usertitle FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.DEPARTMENT = #searchDeptId#
C.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
C.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
C.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, startdate DESC, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.DEPARTMENT = #searchDeptId#
C.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
C.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
C.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')

SELECT A.cn AS writerid, A.displayname AS username, A.description AS deptname, A.title AS usertitle, A.mail AS useremail, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(#searchStartDate#, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 1, 10) as startdate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_ATTITUDE C WHERE C.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (C.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND C.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (C.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND C.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (C.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND C.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) )) B ON A.cn = B.writer_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND B.start_date IS NULL
A.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
A.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
A.department = #searchDeptId#

SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, B.DISPLAYNAME AS userName, B.TITLE AS jikwi, B.DESCRIPTION AS deptName, group_concat(A.AUTH_DEPT_ID order by C.DISPLAYNAME) AS authDeptId, group_concat(C.DISPLAYNAME order by C.DISPLAYNAME) AS authDeptName, group_concat(A.AUTH_TYPE order by C.DISPLAYNAME) AS authType
FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.AUTH_DEPT_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.USER_ID ORDER BY USERNAME
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #selectUserId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'no' AS mine, A.AUTH_TYPE AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A ON D.CN = A.AUTH_DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'yes' AS mine, '' AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.CN = U.DEPARTMENT AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptName
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, AUTH_DEPT_ID, AUTH_TYPE) VALUES (#selectUserId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #deptId#, #deptAuth#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT ifnull(SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(IFNULL(A.END_DATE, A.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(A.TYPE_ID), 0) AS COUNT, A.TYPE_ID, #months# AS STAT_MONTH FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND A.WRITER_ID = #userId#
AND A.DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND ( (A.START_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.START_DATE <= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.END_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.START_DATE < date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #startTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE >= date_format(CONCAT(#year#, '-', #months#, #endTime#), '%Y-%m-%d %T')) ) GROUP BY A.TYPE_ID

SELECT CN AS deptId, DISPLAYNAME AS deptName
'M' AS authType
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USEFLAG IS NOT NULL AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
SELECT COUNT(ATTITUDE_ID) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISDEL = '1' WHERE TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT attitude_id AS attitudeId, writer_name AS writerName, writer_title AS writerTitle, writer_dept_name AS writerDeptName, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(origin_startdate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS originstartdate, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(origin_enddate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS originenddate, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(change_startdate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'') AS changestartdate, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(change_enddate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'') AS changeenddate, origin_type_name AS origintypename, IFNULL(change_type_name, '') AS changetypename, appr_user_name AS apprusername, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(appr_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS apprdate FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND writer_dept_id = #deptId#
change_type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
writer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
writer_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$
ORDER BY changestartdate DESC, writername
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
CHANGE_TYPE_ID = #searchAttitudeType#
WRITER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
WRITER_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
